channel.title: Life on Rathtakrit
channel.description: Recent content in Life on Rathtakrit

item.title: Warrior Diet
item.content:encoded:
Fat F*ck

The inspiration of starting this project stems organizing photos. Only 1 years prior when I first moved in to Hong Kong, the food is expensive, everythings happens so fast. and I becomme a little thinner, thinner that I ever was….

I’m always and over-weight kid, not once in my life I remember to have no belly sticking out of my body, but I hidden it quite well for some reason. But now, after seeing that photos of me being thin (and looking fucking awesome) I decided something needed to changes

What is this diet, and what are the benefits of fasting

The first day

I started the diet quite uncompulsively, and the first day is quite brutal, my body keeps on being high-alert, stressing out of the comfort, I always love easting unhealth snacks and

Afterwards

the 2-3 become better, I felt a lot of focus on my afternoon time,
